_comment: Tier T0 (trust / refusal / egress): audit hash chain, TF client + cache, HITL, CLI args mutex, assemblePrompt, env. Use `pnpm run mutation:wide` for T1+T2 app surface. Global mutation break threshold 95%. Excludes verify.ts, toonContext, mastra-heavy areas from this narrow job.
_mutator_comment: Disable StringLiteral globally — most survivors are error-message text inside `throw new Error(...)`. Exact-text assertions in tests are brittle without raising security signal. ConditionalExpression / LogicalOperator / EqualityOperator / MethodExpression survivors stay enabled (real refusal-path test gaps).
